designAudit.notes: matched design tokens; fixed 2 spacing regressions during the audit

_field_notes.phase: explore | test | gate | evidence | done | blocked  (resume reads this)
_field_notes.kind: ui | automation | mixed  (drives testing strategy and walkthrough flow selection)
_field_notes.gates.<objective>.exit: process exit code; 0 == pass. The /goal evaluator can confirm gates from these without re-running them.
_field_notes.gates.designAudit.verdict: clean | issues  (subjective gate reduced to a written verdict + who produced it)
_field_notes.gates.video.status: verified | failed-but-unblocking | skipped. 'failed-but-unblocking' = walkthrough hit its retry ceiling (STUCK); log a blocker and CONTINUE, never wait for input.
_field_notes.gates.video.flagged: true if the run is an honest failure (the video shows it not working). An honestly-flagged run still records evidence; it does not fake success.
